# GymApp - Gym Membership Management Web Application

## Project Overview
Modern gym membership management web app with a professional dark-themed login page. Users can log in as either a Teacher or Student with separate workflows.

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 14+ with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Frontend: React with App Router
- Theme: Dark theme with professional design

## Development Setup
- Install dependencies: `npm install`
- Run dev server: `npm run dev`
- Build for production: `npm run build`

## Project Structure
- `/src/app` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts
- `/src/components` - React components (Login, Dashboard, etc.)
- `/src/styles` - Custom styles and theme configuration
- `/public` - Static assets
